month_of_birth.text: ประจำเดือน

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) as age_mem , current_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(('!month_of_birth!')::int,'LT') as month_of_birth from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and extract(month from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) = '!month_of_birth!' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = '010101' /*WHERE*/ order by extract(day from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
